name: StabiliFPS
description: Sodium raises your ceiling, StabiliFPS raises your floor. A client-side Fabric mod focused purely on frame-time STABILITY — not average FPS. It kills the sudden 100 -> 8 -> 100 stutter by pacing chunk-mesh bursts across frames, deferring allocating work before GC pauses, and measuring the metrics that actually matter (1% low, 0.1% low, variance) on a live HUD that tells you WHY each frame dropped (chunk / gc / entity). Designed to never compromise gameplay: the render-distance governor only ever RAISES render distance (never lowers yours), and every gameplay-affecting feature is off by default or strictly additive. Composes with every other perf mod; every feature is independently toggleable. Zero-config safe out of the box.
